human_actions_pending.action: Add yt-dlp.exe and ffmpeg.exe to Tools/ folder
human_actions_pending.context: Tools are declared in .csproj (CopyToOutputDirectory=Always) but the actual binaries are not in the repo. App crashes on startup without them.

decisions.decision: Output folder is Downloads (no VidDrop subfolder)
decisions.rationale: User requested — subfolder was not desired
User wants to see final working app before packaging

decisions.decision: No [STAThread] in original Program.cs top-level syntax
decisions.rationale: Bug — top-level statements don't support [STAThread]; fixed with explicit Main()

next_action: Commit uncommitted changes (batch download + fixes), then test the full flow: paste URL, load txt batch, download, cancel
context_notes: App is functional for phases 1-6 (UI). Installer not yet built. Tools/ binaries must be added manually. Batch download feature added this session with sequential queue and [N/X] progress prefix.
